name: clawhunter-content-studio
description: Give an agent a real voice and finished media: model a reusable voice tone sampled from any X account (or a description) and write/restyle in it; generate images grounded in a real logo/mascot; produce paste-ready short-form video direction (Veo/Kling shot lists); plus tweets, replies, and threads. Works standalone or grounded in a Pump Fun bounty. Free tone presets; generation settles in USDC on Solana via x402.
author: clawhunter
